opportunities.specific_product: upholstered velvet headboard + blackout curtain set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turned this $39 dorm bed into a hotel suite before move-in
opportunities.before_state: bare dorm mattress against cinderblock wall, harsh overhead light, no privacy
opportunities.after_state: upholstered headboard, blackout curtains, warm ambient glow, styled like a boutique room
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy pins are saturated with dorm-decor content right now, exactly in the pre-move-in shopping window ahead of August college start dates.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Hid the pet-hair couch under a $52 stretch cover in 90 seconds
opportunities.before_state: shredded, stained, hair-covered couch that looks embarrassing before guests
opportunities.after_state: tailored, tucked slipcover look that reads as a brand-new sofa
opportunities.why_now: High-commission SKU (24-30%) with reliable year-round demand; summer shedding season and increased entertaining/guests keep pet-hair couch content resurfacing across BHG and Real Simple.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Swapped to $44 cooling sheets mid-heatwave and finally slept through the night
opportunities.before_state: tangled sweaty sheets, box fan angled at the bed, restless night sweats
opportunities.after_state: crisp cooling sheet set, tidy made bed, ceiling fan on low, calm sleep setup
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple is actively pushing 'best cooling products for summer' with up to 60% Prime discounts right now, matching the current mid-July heat wave.

opportunities.specific_product: matte black cabinet hardware + peel-and-stick cabinet wrap kit
opportunities.transformation_hook: $28 cabinet hardware swap made our kitchen look fully renovated
opportunities.before_state: dated brass builder-grade pulls and worn, scuffed cabinet fronts
opportunities.after_state: modern matte black pulls and a clean refreshed cabinet face, no demo required
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's current home-project list pins explicitly call out cabinet refacing as a top summer project, and dated-vs-updated hardware is a recurring BHG 'outdated trends' theme.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products entryway storage bench with mirror
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turned our cluttered entryway into a boutique mudroom for $110
opportunities.before_state: shoes and bags piled by the front door, no landing spot for keys or mail
opportunities.after_state: styled bench with baskets, mirror, and hooks creating a functional welcoming entry
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's entryway-staples pins (lighting, mirrors, storage) are trending into back-to-school household reset content as families prep for fall routines.
